title: Income questions 1-12
description: How to complete income questions 1 to 12 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: 1 Salary or wages 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 1 to declare income from salary or wages from which tax was withheld.

child_links.title: 2 Allowances, earnings, tips, directors fees etc 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 2 to declare payments of income from working, including allowances, payments for service and fees.

child_links.title: 3 Employer lump sum payments 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 3 to declare lump sum payments received from an employer for unused annual or long service leave.

child_links.title: 4 Employment termination payments (ETP) 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 4 to declare employment termination payments you received due to the termination of your employment.

child_links.title: 5 Australian Government allowances and payments 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 5 to declare allowances and payments received from the Australian Government.

child_links.title: 6 Australian Government pensions and allowances 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 6 to declare pensions and allowances received from the Australian Government.

child_links.title: 7 Australian annuities and superannuation income streams 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 7 to declare income you received from Australian superannuation income streams and annuities.

child_links.title: 8 Australian superannuation lump sum payments 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 8 to declare Australian superannuation lump sum payments or death benefit payments you received.

child_links.title: 9 Attributed personal services income 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 9 to declare personal services income attributed to you.

child_links.title: Total tax withheld 2016
child_links.description: Complete the total tax withheld section in your tax return.

child_links.title: 10 Gross interest 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 10 to declare interest paid or credited to you from any source in Australia.

child_links.title: 11 Dividends 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 11 to declare dividends and distributions paid or credited by Australian companies you had shares in.

child_links.title: 12 Employee share schemes 2016
child_links.description: Complete question 12 to declare discounts on employee share scheme interests (ESS interests) you received under an ESS.

child_links.title: Income that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2016
child_links.description: Instructions for completing income questions in the supplementary section of the tax return.

child_links.title: Total income or loss 2016
child_links.description: Complete the total income or loss section of your tax return.
